name: Alert
description: Always on the lookout for danger. +5 to initiative, cant be surprised while conscious.

name: Great Weapon Master
description: Before a melee attack with a heavy weapon, take -5 to hit for +10 damage.

name: War Caster
description: Advantage on Constitution saves to maintain concentration on spells.

name: Lucky
description: You have 3 luck points per long rest to reroll attack rolls, ability checks, or saving throws.

name: Sharpshooter
description: Ranged attacks ignore half and three-quarter cover. Take -5 to hit for +10 damage.
